narrative: Sprint 18: Core API endpoints (Feature 4.2 - Collection + Reports + Billing). Created 5 routers: collect (POST /start, GET /status), reports (GET /tier1), billing (POST /checkout, GET /portal), webhooks (POST /stripe), entitlements (GET /). All endpoints return stub responses with hardcoded data. Registered all routers in main.py with correct prefixes. Created comprehensive test suite (10 tests, 100% pass). Foundation ready for production data integration.
